name: remi
description: Remi — AI front desk for clinics (WhatsApp MVP)

scripts.build: tsc && npm --prefix dashboard install && npm --prefix dashboard run build
scripts.test: tsx tests/booking.test.ts && tsx tests/dashboardAuth.test.ts && tsx tests/reliability.test.ts && tsx tests/reportAndReminders.test.ts && tsx tests/rateLimit.test.ts && tsx tests/messagingChannel.test.ts && tsx tests/insights.test.ts && tsx tests/onboard.test.ts && tsx tests/intake.test.ts && tsx tests/knowledge.test.ts && tsx tests/chase.test.ts && tsx tests/invoiceSources.test.ts && tsx tests/emailDomain.test.ts && tsx tests/payments.test.ts && tsx tests/apiAuth.test.ts
